hook: The full dorm move-in cost: $89 vs $208

scenes.visual_prompt: Flat lay of all five products: chair, bins, lamp, curtains, diffuser laid out on a dorm bed
scenes.voiceover: Here's every dollar I spent turning a bare dorm into a livable room.

scenes.visual_prompt: Chair and under-bed bins highlighted first with a price tag graphic
scenes.voiceover: The core: a folding velvet chair and under-bed bins for $89, the single highest-impact buy.

scenes.visual_prompt: Extra fabric bins, lamp, curtains, and diffuser added one by one with running total ticking up
scenes.voiceover: Add extra bins, a desk lamp, curtains with string lights, and a diffuser.

scenes.visual_prompt: Small ultrasonic diffuser running on a nightstand with a soft LED glow, mist visible
scenes.voiceover: The diffuser was the last $22, and it's the one thing that changed how the room felt in ten minutes.

scenes.visual_prompt: Calculator graphic landing on $208 total with a checkmark
scenes.voiceover: Added up, that's $208 if you go all-in.

scenes.visual_prompt: Split screen: $89 core setup on the left, full $208 setup on the right
scenes.on_screen_text: Tight budget? Just get the $89 set.
scenes.voiceover: Tighter budget? The $89 chair and bin set alone is the one I'd buy first.

scenes.visual_prompt: Final wide shot of the completed dorm room, all five items visible and in use
scenes.on_screen_text: This is what $208 actually looks like
scenes.voiceover: No influencer prices, no guesswork — this is the real breakdown before August.

caption: $89 or $208 — here's exactly where every dollar went and which one to skip if you're tight on budget. Full breakdown on the blog.
